title: Trump says he will soon make a decision about sanctions on Chinese companies buying Iranian oil
summary_full: U.S. President Donald Trump said Friday that he will make a decision over the next few days about lifting sanctions on Chinese oil companies that buy Iranion oil.
summary_public: U.S. President Donald Trump said Friday that he will make a decision over the next few days about lifting sanctions on Chinese oil companies that buy Iranion oil.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: lifting sanctions on Chinese oil companies that buy Iranion oil
